events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1052. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: sesame, egg. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes pork. Cooking ability: stovetop. 7 meals/week, zone Sunset.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Shrimp Chow Mein
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 61 g outside 40–55 g range.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/800 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame/egg ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/800 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame/egg ✓.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 435/800 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 40–55) ✓, no sesame/egg ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1052 added to route R-SUNS-1 (Sunset), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1052: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
